scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});require('fs').rmSync('../../../node_modules/.cache/jue/lab',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts src/examples.ts src/inspect.ts src/testkit.ts src/bench.ts src/cli.ts src/compile-examples.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=esnext --external:@jue/compiler --external:@jue/compiler/frontend --external:@jue/shared --outdir=dist --sourcemap && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
